name: dark cavern
hints: A dark underground cavern. There may be a fountain here and a crevice leading back up. Be careful - the crevice exit may be deadly.
The stone tablet can be used in the fountain here (IN FOUNTAIN). Going through the crevice back up is dangerous.
IN FOUNTAIN with the stone tablet to interact with it. WARNING: GO CREVICE causes death. Find another way out.
Use the fountain carefully. The crevice exit is a trap - it kills you. You may need a light source or rope to escape safely.
notes: Dark cavern beneath the island, accessed via the crevice. Has a fountain where the stone tablet can be dropped (PLOOSH). WARNING: GO CREVICE to exit causes death. Must find an alternative escape route. The fountain interaction is important for the quest.
